---
title: "Natasha Kang"
subtitle: "Ph.D. in Economics, University of British Columbia"
---

Assistant Professor, Wang Yanan Institute for Studies in Economics, Xiamen University

Research interests: time series econometrics and macroeconomics.

---

[natk@xmu.edu.cn](mailto:natk@xmu.edu.cn) · [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-1871-2260) · [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=0pbhGTIAAAAJ&hl=en)
